---
title: "Renato Pedroso Lauris"
image: media/profile2.jpeg
toc: true
about: 
  template: trestles
  # image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/renato-lauris/
    target: _blank
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: https://github.com/renatolauris
    target: _blank
  - icon: twitter-x
    text: Twitter X
    href: https://x.com/Renato_Lauris
    target: _blank
  - icon: at
    text: Email
    href: mailto:renato.lauris@gmail.com
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

## Projetos

- Análise da Primeira Infância no Brasil
